title: Explosions reported

description_uk: Отличные новости для Крымского моста: в Украине разработали тяжелый подводный дрон SEA TRIDENT, способный нести до 1 тонны взрывчатки Как сообщает портал Милитарный, подводный дрон адаптирован для морских операций, нуждающихся в полной автономности и низком уровне заметности. Максимальная скорость – 18,5 км/ч. Рабочая глубина погружения – 60 метров. Одно из предназначений - уничтожение...

title: Casualties reported
description: 👨‍🚒 Moscow kills those who save lives 🕯️We bow our heads in sorrow for the emergency services rescuers who died in Kharkiv while saving lives. They arrived at the site of the enemy attack to help the victims, but Moscow cynically struck again just as the emergency services were working. 🫡 Eternal memory and honor to the Heroes who, until their last breath, remained faithful to their duty and saved others...
description_en: 👨‍🚒 Moscow kills those who save lives 🕯️We bow our heads in sorrow for the emergency services rescuers who died in Kharkiv while saving lives. They arrived at the site of the enemy attack to help the victims, but Moscow cynically struck again just as the emergency services were working. 🫡 Eternal memory and honor to the Heroes who, until their last breath, remained faithful to their duty and saved others...
description_uk: 👨‍🚒 московія вбиває тих, хто рятує життя 🕯️Схиляємо голови у скорботі за рятувальниками ДСНС, які загинули в Харкові, рятуючи життя. Вони прибули на місце ворожого удару, щоб допомогти постраждалим, але московія цинічно завдала повторного удару саме тоді, коли працювали екстрені служби. 🫡 Вічна пам’ять і шана Героям, які до останнього подиху залишалися вірними своєму обов’язку та рятували інших...

title: Strike confirmed
description: Representatives of UNESCO and the UN are already working at the site of the impact on the laurel, recording the damage. The fire did not reach the interior of the Assumption Cathedral, but there was smoke. There are two holes in the vault and the smell of burnt wood. Water on the floor - from suffocation. According to the general director of the reserve "Kyiv-Pecherska Lavra" Maksym...
description_en: Representatives of UNESCO and the UN are already working at the site of the impact on the laurel, recording the damage. The fire did not reach the interior of the Assumption Cathedral, but there was smoke. There are two holes in the vault and the smell of burnt wood. Water on the floor - from suffocation. According to the general director of the reserve "Kyiv-Pecherska Lavra" Maksym...
description_uk: На месте ударов в лавре уже работают представители ЮНЕСКО и ООН, фиксируя повреждения. Огонь внутрь Успенского собора не попал, но было задымление Корреспондент УНИАН Дмитрий Хилюк сообщает, что видимых повреждений иконостаса в Успенском соборе нет. Есть две дыры в своде и запах горелого дерева. Вода на полу - от тушения. По словам, гендиректора заповедника "Киево-Печерская лавра" Максима...

description: Irish alumina exports to Russia escape latest EU sanctions, but political pressure is growing. The EU's forthcoming sanctions package won't include Ireland's alumina exports to Russia, but a new letter by members of the European Parliament (MEPs), combined with pressure from Estonia's foreign minister and civil society activists, shows the issue is not going to disappear over the summer.
description_en: Irish alumina exports to Russia escape latest EU sanctions, but political pressure is growing. The EU's forthcoming sanctions package won't include Ireland's alumina exports to Russia, but a new letter by members of the European Parliament (MEPs), combined with pressure from Estonia's foreign minister and civil society activists, shows the issue is not going to disappear over the summer.

title: Kyiv: Attack attack
description: Three injured as aftermath of Russian attack recorded in five settlements across Kyiv Oblast – photos Three people, including a child, were injured in Kyiv Oblast as a result of a large-scale Russian attack on the night of 14-15 June, which also caused fires and damaged homes, vehicles and warehouse facilities. Read the full article on our website

title: Cruise missile heading inbound
description: "No Kalibrov, one of the best results of the Zircons": Ignat told how this Russian night attack differed from the previous ones. The massive attack carried out by the occupation army of the Russian Federation on the night of June 15 differs from the one on June 2 in that instead of Kalibr-type sea-based cruise missiles, the enemy launched Iskanders.
description_en: "No Kalibrov, one of the best results of the Zircons": Ignat told how this Russian night attack differed from the previous ones. The massive attack carried out by the occupation army of the Russian Federation on the night of June 15 differs from the one on June 2 in that instead of Kalibr-type sea-based cruise missiles, the enemy launched Iskanders.
description_uk: "Нет Калибров, один их лучших результатов по "Цирконам": Игнат рассказал, чем эта ночная атака русни отличалась от предыдущих Массированная атака, которую в ночь на 15 июня совершила оккупационная армия РФ, отличается от той, что была 2 июня тем, что вместо крылатых ракет морского базирования типа «Калибр» враг запустил «Искандеры». Об этом в эфире телемарафона заявил начальник управления...

title: Airstrike attack
description: Minister of Foreign Affairs of Ukraine Andriy Sybiga on the reaction to the Russian attack on the Kyiv-Pechersk Lavra: "We urgently initiate all relevant procedures within the framework of UNESCO and all other international mechanisms, demanding an immediate and adequate response to this state barbarism." Having attacked the Kiev-Pechersk Lavra, one of the greatest shrines of Christianity, Putin forever inscribed his name on the list...

description_uk: Міністр закордонних справ України Андрій Сибіга про реакцію на удар РФ по Києво-Печерській Лаврі: "Ми терміново ініціюємо всі відповідні процедури в рамках ЮНЕСКО та всі інші міжнародні механізми, вимагаючи негайної та адекватної відповіді на це державне варварство". Завдавши удару по Києво-Печерській лаврі, одній з найбільших святинь християнства, Путін назавжди вписав своє ім'я у список...

title: Kharkiv: 50 missiles intercepted
description: DOWN/SUPPRESSED 632 TARGETS: 50 MISSILES AND 582 ENEMY UAVs ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ On the night of June 15 (from 6:00 p.m. on June 14), the enemy launched a massive combined attack on Ukraine using shock UAVs, air-to-air and ground-based missiles of various types. ❗️ The main direction of the attack is Kyiv. Dnipro and Kharkiv were also attacked with rockets. A total of 681 devices were recorded by the radio engineering troops of the Air Force...

Dnipro and Kharkiv were also attacked with rockets. A total of 681 devices were recorded by the radio engineering troops of the Air Force...
description_uk: ЗБИТО/ПОДАВЛЕНО 632 ЦІЛІ: 50 РАКЕТ ТА 582 ВОРОЖІ БПЛА ➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖➖ У ніч на 15 червня (з 18:00 14 червня), противник завдав масованого комбінованого удару по Україні із застосуванням ударних БпЛА, ракет повітряного, наземного базування різних типів. ❗️ Основний напрямок удару – Київ. Також ракетами атаковано Дніпро та Харків. Усього радіотехнічними військами Повітряних Сил зафіксовано 681 засіб...

title: Kyiv: 17 injured
description: Update: 17 injured in Kyiv amid ongoing large-scale Russian attack. At least 17 people have been injured in Kyiv as Russian missiles and drones continue to target Ukraine's capital in Moscow's latest large-scale attack. Among the targets of the attack is the historic Assumption Cathedral within the Kyiv Pechersk Lavra, which suffered a direct strike, officials reported.
description_en: Update: 17 injured in Kyiv amid ongoing large-scale Russian attack. At least 17 people have been injured in Kyiv as Russian missiles and drones continue to target Ukraine's capital in Moscow's latest large-scale attack. Among the targets of the attack is the historic Assumption Cathedral within the Kyiv Pechersk Lavra, which suffered a direct strike, officials reported.

At least 17 people have been injured in Kyiv as Russian missiles and drones continue to target Ukraine's capital in Moscow's latest large-scale attack. Among the targets of the attack is the historic Assumption Cathedral within the Kyiv Pechersk Lavra, which suffered a direct strike, officials reported.

title: Kyiv: 6 injured
description: Update: At least 6 injured in Kyiv as Russia strikes residential buildings, historic Pechersk Lavra. At least six people have been injured in Kyiv amid a large-scale Russian attack, as a fire continues to burn at the historic Dormition Cathedral in the Kyiv Pechersk Lavra. 📷 Archbishop Yevstratiy Zoria

title: Kyiv: Ballistic missile launch detected
description: Breaking: Residential buildings struck in Kyiv amid large-scale Russian missile, drone attack. Russia launched yet another round of large-scale strikes on Kyiv overnight on June 15, Ukrainian officials reported, targeting the capital with ballistic missiles and drones. Several multi-story residential buildings were struck in the capital, officials said.
description_en: Breaking: Residential buildings struck in Kyiv amid large-scale Russian missile, drone attack. Russia launched yet another round of large-scale strikes on Kyiv overnight on June 15, Ukrainian officials reported, targeting the capital with ballistic missiles and drones. Several multi-story residential buildings were struck in the capital, officials said.
description_uk: Breaking: Residential buildings struck in Kyiv amid large-scale Russian missile, drone attack. Russia launched yet another round of large-scale strikes on Kyiv overnight on June 15, Ukrainian officials reported, targeting the capital with ballistic missiles and drones. Several multi-story residential buildings were struck in the capital, officials said.

title: Kyiv: Explosions reported
description: Explosions heard in Kyiv. Explosions were reported in Kyiv around 1 a.m. local time, according to a Kyiv Independent journalist on the ground. Ukrainian officials have warned of the threat of a large-scale missile and drone attack on Kyiv overnight.
description_en: Explosions heard in Kyiv. Explosions were reported in Kyiv around 1 a.m. local time, according to a Kyiv Independent journalist on the ground. Ukrainian officials have warned of the threat of a large-scale missile and drone attack on Kyiv overnight.

title: Kharkiv: Evacuation ordered
description: Kharkiv Art Museum in flames after 'cynical' Russian drone attack. The strike caused a major fire at a critical Ukrainian cultural site and injured five people, including a 1-month-old infant, authorities said. The baby has been hospitalized and emergency crews are at work to evacuate exhibits from the museum. Photo: Ukraine's State Emergency Service / Telegram
description_en: Kharkiv Art Museum in flames after 'cynical' Russian drone attack. The strike caused a major fire at a critical Ukrainian cultural site and injured five people, including a 1-month-old infant, authorities said. The baby has been hospitalized and emergency crews are at work to evacuate exhibits from the museum. Photo: Ukraine's State Emergency Service / Telegram

title: Kyiv: Drone strike near civilians
title_uk: Київ: удар безпілотників поблизу мирних жителів
description: From Ukraine's war zone to loving homes When war approaches, people may be able to pack their lives into a suitcase and flee within hours. Animals, however, cannot. In areas where humans can no longer enter, animals are often the last living beings left behind amid relentless drone attacks and artillery fire, with little chance of survival. As part of the "Finding Home" project, the Kyiv...
